properties.query: INSERT INTO users (user_code, login_id, name, birth, tel_num, password, pw_answer, user_type, findByLoginI1d) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE users SET is_active = 'N', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = ?
UPDATE users SET password = ?, tel_num = ?, name = ?, pw_answer = ? WHERE id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE user_code = ? AND name = ? AND birth = ? AND user_type = ?
SELECT login_id FROM users WHERE user_code = ?
UPDATE users SET login_id = ?, password = ?, tel_num = ?, pw_answer = ? WHERE user_code = ?
SELECT id FROM users WHERE user_code = ?
SELECT login_id FROM users WHERE user_code = ? AND name = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE login_id = ? AND user_code = ? AND pw_answer = ?
UPDATE users SET password = ? WHERE login_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(pt.tag_id) AS total_hearts FROM peer_reviews pr JOIN peer_review_tags pt ON pr.id = pt.review_id WHERE pr.reviewee_id = ?

SELECT ht.tag_name, COUNT(pt.tag_id) AS tag_count FROM peer_reviews pr JOIN peer_review_tags pt ON pr.id = pt.review_id JOIN heart_tags ht ON pt.tag_id = ht.id WHERE pr.reviewee_id = ? GROUP BY ht.id, ht.tag_name ORDER BY tag_count DESC LIMIT 3
UPDATE users SET is_heart_public = ? WHERE id = ?
